name: io.github.its-qusai-nasr/jira-admin-mcp
description: 78 tools to administer Jira Cloud: issues, fields, workflows, permissions, projects, bulk ops.

environmentVariables.name: JIRA_BASE_URL
environmentVariables.description: Jira Cloud base URL, e.g. https://your-company.atlassian.net

environmentVariables.name: JIRA_EMAIL
environmentVariables.description: Atlassian account email that owns the API token

environmentVariables.name: JIRA_DRY_RUN
environmentVariables.description: When true, simulate all write operations instead of executing them
